title: Discounted Water Service - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Discounted Water Service 27 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO 211INFO UTILITY ASSISTANCE UPDATES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers up-to-date information about utility assistance available in the tri-county (Portland Metro) area. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email Visit Website More Details CITY OF ASHLAND ASHLAND MUNICIPAL UTILITY LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers electric, water, and sewer discount program. The discount is 30% with a maximum of $400 each year. Participants must apply yearly. Program year is from July 1-June 30. 2245 Ashland Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Household income at or below 200% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Office: Tuesday/Friday 9am-1pm Email (541) 488-6004 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF CORNELIUS SENIOR CITIZEN WATER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly discount on the base water rate. 1355 N Barlow Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Age 65 and older. Must reside at the address receiving the discount and is responsible for making payments directly to the City for water service for the address listed on the application. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 357-9112 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF CORVALLIS CORVALLIS WATER LOW-INCOME ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a reduction on base rate of monthly charge for water of up to $68.74 each month. Household must renew annually. 501 SW Madison Avenue Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Households must be receiving one of the following benefit programs and are single-dwelling residential customers of the City of Corvallis: OHP, SNAP, or Corvallis School District 509J household direct certification Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 766-6990 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced rates on water, sewer, and storm drain bills. 475 SE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Ages 62 and older who are at or below 60% of Oregon’s current median income. Must be the applicant's primary residence, and service must be billed in the applicant's name. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm Email (503) 630-8270 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF GLADSTONE LOW INCOME WATER/SEWER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a reduction on base rate of monthly charge for water, sewer,and storm water services. 18505 Portland Avenue Gladstone, OR 97027 Eligibility: -Must meet income guidelines that are based on 50% of Median Family Income (see website for current chart) -Utility bills must be in the applicant's name and the applicant must reside at the property -Applicant cannot be delinquent in any payment owed to the City of Gladstone Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 557-2771 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF HERMISTON UTILITY PAYMENT DISCOUNTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers reduced monthly utility bills for water, sewage, and garbage for eligible customers. 180 NE 2nd Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: -Water and sewer payment discounts: Must meet federal poverty guidelines -Garbage service payment discounts: Age 65 and older and must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 567-5521 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF HUBBARD LOW-INCOME SENIOR CITIZENS WATER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water utility discount. 3720 Second Street Hubbard, OR 97032 Eligibility: -Age 65 and older -Must meet annual household income requirements -Applications must be renewed annually by July 1st Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm (503) 981-6333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF LA GRANDE WATER AND SEWER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced monthly utility (water and sewage) payments by 20%. Must be renewed annually. 1000 Adams Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: -Single-family residence -Current water and/or sewer service provided by the City of La Grande within the City Limits -Yearly household income less than the federal poverty level: 2025 Federal Poverty Guidelines $15,650 for a single person household; $21,150 for 2 people; $26,650 for 3 people; $32,150 for 4 people; $37,650 for 5 people; for over 6 add per child add $5,500 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 962-1313 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF LAKE OSWEGO TEMPORARY UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Residents may be eligible for one-time emergency assistance for water, sewer, surface water, and street maintenance. Assistance is limited to no more than two months within a rolling 12 month period. 380 A Avenue Lake Oswego, OR 97034 Eligibility: Customer must be residing at a single family dwelling or accessory dwelling unit and the utility bill in their name, must show emergency financial need. Utility address must be within the City of Lake Oswego. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 635-0265 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF MILWAUKIE LOW INCOME UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a reduced monthly charge for water, sewer, storm, and street utility charges. The reduced rates are: -A waiver of the established base charge for water service -One half of the established billing and administration charge, treatment charge, and volume charge for wastewater (sewer) -One half of the established base charge and volume charge for stormwater charges -A waiver of the street maintenance and SAFE fee 10501 SE Main Street Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Applicant must meet all of the following criteria: -Must be a residential utility customer of the City of Milwaukie -Must not be delinquent in any payment owed to the City of Milwaukie, including utilities, local improvement district assessments, Milwaukie Municipal Court fines, or library fines -Must not exceed the current gross annual household income levels established by the Housing Authority of Clackamas County as qualifying for Section 8 (see website for income limits) -Property must be occupied and used by the applicant as their principal residence during the period for which a reduced rate is applied Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 786-7525 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF NEWBERG WATER AND WASTEWATER BILL CREDIT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly credit on water and sewer accounts. Active accounts for water and sewer services receive a monthly $25 credit, and active accounts billed with water services only receive a monthly $15 credit. If approved, credits are applied for 12 months. 414 E 1st Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Low income households, active duty military members, and veterans who have a current account that is not more than 30 days past due Hours: Applications only accepted from June 1-June 30 Email (503) 537-1205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF OREGON CITY DISCOUNT UTILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers reduced water and sewer rates available for low-income customers. 625 Center Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Must meet income guidelines. Account must be current and in the applicant's name. Annual household income guidelines: -1 person: $36,811 -2 people: $48,138 -3 people: $59,464 -4 people: $70,790 -5 people: $82,117 -6 people: $93,443 -7 people: $95,567 -8 people: $97,690 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 657-8151 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND WATER BUREAU CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 664 N Tillamook Street Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 823-7770 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF REDMOND UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the opportunity for reduced monthly utility (water, sewage, and stormwater) bills. 411 SW 9th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Residential customers who meet income limits Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm; closed holidays Email (541) 923-7765 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF WEST LINN LOW INCOME UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a reduced-rate utility program for water, sewer, storm drain, and street and park maintenance service. 22500 Salamo Road West Linn, OR 97068 Eligibility: Low-income households with income no higher than 185% of the federal poverty level. Utility bills must be in the applicant's name and the applicant must reside at the property. Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm, closed alternate Fridays. View city calendar on website for details. Email (503) 656-4262 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY SERVICES CONSORTIUM ALBANY REGIONAL OFFICE ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water service discount for low-income older adults and adults with disabilities who are City of Albany water customers. Does not provide funds to pay for water bills. 250 Broadalbin Street SW Suite 2A Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with documented disabilities. Income limits also apply. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 928-6335 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 721-1740 3 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 208-2174 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL MID COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL HOOD RIVER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides energy payment assistance programs, emergency assistance for electric bills, heating fuel payment assistance, low-income water assistance programs, water, and garbage discount programs. 606 State Street Suite 1b Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: -Energy assistance: Low-income households -Emergency assistance: Low-income households with past due or shut-off notices -Water or power discounts: Residents served by the City of Hood River Water who have an active Pacific Power account in the applicant's name. Apartments or rentals that have water paid by another party are eligible for the discount as long as they are within the service area of City of Hood River. The City applies a discount to the client’s Pacific Power bill in lieu of a water bill discount in that case. -Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities: Monthly power, water, sewer, and garbage bill discounts for customers of City of The Dalles, Northern Wasco County PUD, and The Dalles or Hood River Disposal -Outreach: Must live within the service area and demonstrate crisis or a special need. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 298-5131 206 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL THE GLORIA CENTER UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides energy payment assistance programs, emergency assistance for electric bills, heating fuel payment assistance, low-income water assistance programs, water, and garbage discount programs. 2505 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: -Energy assistance: Low-income households -Emergency assistance: Low-income households with past due or shut-off notices -Water or power discounts: Residents served by the City of Hood River Water who have an active Pacific Power account in the applicant's name. Apartments or rentals that have water paid by another party are eligible for the discount as long as they are within the service area of City of Hood River. The City applies a discount to the client’s Pacific Power bill in lieu of a water bill discount in that case. -Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities: Monthly power, water, sewer, and garbage bill discounts for customers of City of The Dalles, Northern Wasco County PUD, and The Dalles or Hood River Disposal -Outreach: Must live within the service area and demonstrate crisis or a special need. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 298-5131 200 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION ENERGY SERVICES GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referral to the City of Salem's Rate Relief program for garbage, sewer, and water discounts. 4700 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: -City of Salem account holder residing in the home -Age 60 and older or documented permanent disability household member -Gross household income does not exceed 60% of state median income based on family size -Referals made for current year LIHEAP/OEAP recipients (October-September) Hours: Walk in: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Phones: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 588-9016 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORIMPACT BEND OFFICE UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with past-due electric, natural gas, and heating fuel (propane, wood, oil, pellets) bills. Assistance is not guaranteed and is dependent on funding availability. 20310 Empire Avenue Suite A100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Households at 60% or below of State Median Income Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OAK LODGE WATER SERVICES FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE UTILITY RATE RELIEF PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a discounted rate for water service bills including the base rate of water, and the base and consumption charges for wastewater and watershed protection. Approved applicants will receive a 50% reduction. Retroactive financial adjustments are not applicable. Must re-apply every 12 months. 14496 SE River Road Oak Grove, OR 97267 Eligibility: - Bill must be in the applicant's name and have no outstanding balance - The property must be the applicant's primary residence and the applicant owns no other property - Household must meet income limits: 1 person: $43,450 2 person: $49,650 3 person: $55,850 4 person: $62,050 5 person: $67,500 6 person: $72,000 7 person: $76,950 8 person: $81,950 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 654-7765 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUR JUST FUTURE CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 10550 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Tuesday/Friday 9am-11:45am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 548-0217 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OUR JUST FUTURE OUR JUST FUTURE ROCKWOOD BUILDING CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 124 NE 181st Avenue Suite 109 Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-11:45am and 1pm-4pm Email (503) 548-0217 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SELF ENHANCEMENT INC SELF ENHANCEMENT INC COMMUNITY & FAMILY PROGRAMS CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 310 NE Failing Street Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 713-5590 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ASHLAND LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT CITY OF CORNELIUS SENIOR CITIZEN WATER DISCOUNT CITY OF CORVALLIS CORVALLIS WATER LOW-INCOME ASSISTANCE PROGRAM CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM CITY OF GLADSTONE LOW INCOME WATER/SEWER PROGRAM CITY OF HERMISTON UTILITY PAYMENT DISCOUNTS CITY OF HUBBARD LOW-INCOME SENIOR CITIZENS WATER DISCOUNT CITY OF LA GRANDE WATER AND SEWER DISCOUNT CITY OF LAKE OSWEGO TEMPORARY UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM CITY OF MILWAUKIE LOW INCOME UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM CITY OF NEWBERG WATER AND WASTEWATER BILL CREDIT PROGRAMS CITY OF OREGON CITY DISCOUNT UTILITY PROGRAM CITY OF PORTLAND CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM CITY OF REDMOND UTILITY ASSISTANCE CITY OF WEST LINN LOW INCOME UTILITY ASSISTANCE PROGRAM COMMUNITY SERVICES CONSORTIUM ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM IMPACT NW CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM LATINO NETWORK CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL UTILITY ASSISTANCE MID-COLUMBIA COMMUNITY ACTION COUNCIL UTILITY ASSISTANCE MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM NEIGHBORIMPACT UTILITY ASSISTANCE OAK LODGE WATER SERVICES FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE UTILITY RATE RELIEF PROGRAM OUR JUST FUTURE CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM OUR JUST FUTURE CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM SELF ENHANCEMENT INC CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM
